Adult Probation Department Credit Calculation Report Request
CONFIDENTIAL DA Subpoena Duces Tecum Filed
Warrant - Bench Warrant Return 07/06/2022 FTA PRE-TRIAL CONFERENCE, 3 OF 3 BWI
DEFT OPP TO DA MOT TO CONSOLIDATE FILED
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR: 07-01-22/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE-S23 AND TRIAL-S22/DOP/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: IN THE AM:/NP/X: PER THE DEPUTY, DEFT REFUSED TO BE TRANSPT'D TO COURT TODAY,/X: IN THE PM:/X: SFSO SGT, MICHAEL ROMANO APPEARS VIA PHONE & CONFIRMS - DEFT'S REFUSAL TO BE TRANSPT'D TO COURT TODAY & THAT DEFT WAS ADMONISHED AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD,/ /DEF: APPEARSVIA ATTY'S PHONE & ADDRESSES THE COURT RE HIS PHYSICAL CONDITION AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD/X: AFTER THE COURT ADDRESSES DEFT, COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSETO PROCEED IN DEFT'S ABSENCE,/DEF 170,6JUD: JUDGE MCNAUGHTON AS TO THIS CASE ONLY,  NOT DEFT'S  OTHER TWO CASES PER JUDGE MCNAUGHTON/MO DENIED/X: COURT STATES THAT THE MOTION IS UNTIMELY,/WITEXCL: DEFENSE/WIT SWORN DA: SFPD OFFICER MICHAEL ROTSCHI/EXHMA:PEO'S 1) SFPD BOOKING PHOTO, PEO'S 2) PHOTO, PEO'S 3) VIDEO FROM BODY-WORN-CAMERA, PEO'S 4) CERTIFIED COPY OF CII REPORT,  PEO'S 5) CERTIFIED COPY OF DMV RECORD/EXHMA: DEF'S A) PHOTO, DEF'SB) PHOTO, DEF'S C) PHOTO, DEF'S D) PHOTO, & DEF'S E) PHOTO/ /ARG&SUB/HTA1:1 & 3 /X: THE COURT'S FINDINGS AS TO ALLEGATION(S) ARE SET FORTH ON THE RECORD,/871D: 2 & 5/X: COUNT(S) 4 CERTIFIED AS MISDEMEANOR(S),/BAIL: 75,000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/CTORD: EXHIBITS RETURNED TO THE OFFERING PARTY/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT ON THE INFORMATION IN DEPT 22 ON 05-02-22/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/NP/X:DEFENDANT REFUSED TO ATTEND COURT/X:PEOPLE'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE 21002338, 21008494, 21001556 FILED/CONTD:MOTIONTO CONSOLIDATE HEARING/DOP/

/CAL:MOTION TO DETAIN/X:BAIL REMAINS AT 75,000/X:THE COURT FINDS BY CLEARAND CONVINCING EVIDENCE THAT RELEASING THE DEFENDANT OR LESS RESTRICTIVE ALTERNATIVES TO INCARCERATION WOULD NOT/X:REASONABLY PROTECT THE PUBLIC ORTHE VICTIM/X:THE COURT MAKES FURTHER FACTUAL FINDINGS ON THE RECORD,/X:MOTION TO DETAIN GRANTED WITHOUT PREJUDICE/NTW60/LD:04-18-22/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/

/CAL:INSTRUCTION, ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA, AND COUNSEL/X:DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL IS FILED IN COURT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:03-03-22/BAIL:75,000/CONTD:DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING, LD 04-18-22/NP/DEF:REFUSED TO COME TO COURT/CONT/DOPC/
/NP/X:DEFENDANT IS IN THE HOSPITAL/CONTD I&A P&C DOP/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA AND COUNSEL/CAUSE/DOPC/BAIL:75,000/
